strengths: 17+ years of hands-on engineering experience spanning web, mobile, embedded, high-scale infrastructure, and AI-agent tooling — comfortably meeting the 15-year minimum.
Entrepreneurial track record: founded GISCollective, worked at multiple early-stage startups, and shipped open-source developer tools with real adoption.
Recent work at re:cinq on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators demonstrates active, practical engagement with current agentic AI tooling.
concerns: AI expertise is nascent — it appears only from April 2025 onward, with no prior demonstrated AI products, platforms, publications, or recognized thought leadership in the space.
No advanced degree in an AI-related field; credentials are a BS in Computer Science and a Fine Arts degree, falling short of the preferred Master's or PhD.
Career history is execution-focused IC work with no evidence of director-level strategic advising, customer/partner engagement, or cross-organizational influence at the scale the role demands.
response.justification: Bogdan brings solid full-stack and systems engineering depth accumulated over 17 years, genuine entrepreneurial instincts, and fresh hands-on exposure to AI-agent tooling — all genuine assets. However, the role is a director-level principal expected to shape AI strategy, advise strategic customers, and be a recognized external voice on AI; Bogdan's AI engagement is less than two years old, his background shows no advisory or organizational influence experience, and there is no evidence of the thought-leadership profile (publications, keynotes, recognized platforms) the position targets. The gap between his current seniority and the expectations of this role is substantial.
